languages.text: "Вы даже не позволите мне объясниться? Впрочем, я не имею права вас осуждать".
"Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."
languages.original_text: "Вы даже не позволите мне объясниться? Впрочем, я не имею права вас осуждать".

traits.locale_text: "Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."
"Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."
"Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."

languages.text: «¿No va a permitirme que me explique? Bueno, supongo que no estoy en posición de criticarle».
languages.original_text: "Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."

traits.locale_text: «¿No va a permitirme que me explique? Bueno, supongo que no estoy en posición de criticarle».

languages.text: “您连个解释的机会都不给我吗？也罢，我没资格指责您。”
languages.original_text: "Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."

traits.locale_text: “您连个解释的机会都不给我吗？也罢，我没资格指责您。”

languages.text: « Sans même me permettre de m'expliquer ? Enfin, je suis mal placé pour vous critiquer. »
languages.original_text: "Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."

traits.locale_text: « Sans même me permettre de m'expliquer ? Enfin, je suis mal placé pour vous critiquer. »

languages.text: "Kendimi açıklamama izin vermez misiniz? Şey... Gerçi sizi eleştirmeye hakkım yok."
languages.original_text: "Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."

traits.locale_text: "Kendimi açıklamama izin vermez misiniz? Şey... Gerçi sizi eleştirmeye hakkım yok."

languages.text: "Erlaubt Ihr mir nicht, mich zu erklären? Andererseits habe ich nicht das Recht, Euch zu kritisieren."
languages.original_text: "Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."

traits.locale_text: "Erlaubt Ihr mir nicht, mich zu erklären? Andererseits habe ich nicht das Recht, Euch zu kritisieren."

languages.text: 「釈明させてもらえませんか？でも、私にはあなたを批判する権利はありません」。
languages.original_text: "Won't you allow me to explain myself? But, then, I have no right to criticise you."
